name: Crunchy Lemon Syrup Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 180°C/350°F.
2. Grease and line a 7-inch round cake tin.
3. Beat together the sugar and butter until fluffy.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, then add sifted flour and lemon rind. Mix well.
5. Pour into the cake tin and bake for 40-45 minutes, or until golden and risen and an inserted skewer comes out clean.
6. Topping:
- Sprinkle sugar over the top of the hot cake.
- Spoon lemon juice over the top.
7. Cool in the tin.
Topping:
Sprinkle granulated sugar over the top of the hot cake, and spoon lemon juice over it. Cool in the tin.
